A cybersecurity firm, “Red Access,” contacted us less than 24 hours before going to the media with vague claims about Replit.

This is not how responsible security research works. The standard practice in terms of disclosure policies, as followed by CISA, CERT/CC, and most major

You’re moving forward…

But is it actually progress?

If you had to restart today,
what would you do differently?

Tonight, I hooked up a BOSS RC-600 Looper to a Strandberg guitar (that I can barely play three chords on) and a Yamaha Genos keyboard (that I can somewhat play). 

The most surprising thing about the experience?

That I did not gain any wisdom about B2B SaaS that I can share with

“eBay doesn’t need 11,000+ employees. It hasn’t changed since 2005.

I could run it from my house.” 
@ryancohen
 

He’s got my vote!

OpenAI and Anthropic announced almost identical enterprise deployment ventures in the same week.

That is not a coincidence.

Both are racing to lock up PE portfolio companies as distribution channels before the other side does.

The AI race stopped being about benchmarks the

Before buying an AI tool for your shop, do this:

1. Open your project tracker
2. Find the 3 tasks logged most often
3. Time how long each one takes end-to-end
4. Multiply by the fully loaded hourly rate of whoever does it

That number is your AI budget ceiling.

If the tool

90% of an "AI transformation" budget should go to integration and data cleanup. 10% to the model.

Most vendors sell you the 10% because that's where their margin lives.

Fix the plumbing first. Otherwise your shiny model is just a more expensive way to be wrong.
